data.title: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and CLAUDE.md for polyglot gate pipeline (S5)
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN (doc update — no RED tests required per story DDs)

Update documentation to reflect the completed polyglot lint/format gate pipeline.

## Changes to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

### 1. commands.lint 'Used by' field (currently line 241)
Current: Skills: /dso:sprint, /dso:fix-bug, validate-work
Add: validate.sh (reads this key as of story 8657-e8cc)
Updated: validate.sh, validate-phase.sh (when present), skills: /dso:sprint, /dso:fix-bug, validate-work

### 2. commands.format_check 'Used by' field (currently line 263)
Current: .claude/scripts/dso validate.sh, pre-commit hooks
Add: gate-2b-blast-radius.sh, gate-2d-dependency-check.sh, validate-phase.sh
Updated: validate.sh, gate-2b-blast-radius.sh, gate-2d-dependency-check.sh, validate-phase.sh, pre-commit hooks

## Changes to CLAUDE.md

### 1. Add one-liner to Architecture section about polyglot lint/format gates
Add near the validate.sh line (or in the Commands section):
**Polyglot lint/format gates**: validate.sh and gate scripts read commands.lint and commands.format_check to run stack-appropriate linting and format checking. Onboarding auto-fills per-stack defaults via prefill-config.sh. See CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md for per-stack defaults table.

Note: CLAUDE.md bloat rules (Architectural Invariant 2b) require this to be a one-liner with a doc reference, not an expanded implementation description.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- CLAUDE.md

## Acceptance criteria
- CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md commands.lint and commands.format_check 'Used by' fields include new consumers
- CLAUDE.md architecture section has a one-liner reference to polyglot gate pipeline
- No duplicate rules added to CLAUDE.md
- Follows .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md conventions
